name: mpesa-mcp
description: MCP server for East African fintech APIs — M-Pesa (Safaricom Daraja) and Africa's Talking. Give AI agents the ability to trigger M-Pesa payments, check transaction status, send SMS, and top up airtime across 20+ African telecom networks.

tools.name: mpesa_stk_push
tools.description: Trigger an M-Pesa STK Push payment request to a customer's phone

tools.name: mpesa_stk_query
tools.description: Check the status of an M-Pesa STK Push transaction

tools.name: mpesa_transaction_status
tools.description: Query the status of any M-Pesa transaction by receipt number

tools.name: sms_send
tools.description: Send SMS to up to 1,000 recipients across 20+ African telecom networks via Africa's Talking

tools.name: airtime_send
tools.description: Top up airtime for any mobile subscriber across African networks

related.name: daraja-v3
related.description: Python SDK for Safaricom Daraja API

related.name: kenya-sms
related.description: Africa's Talking SMS wrapper with bilingual EN/SW templates
